scope.evidence_model: Sponsor-provided GJB or secrecy-system overlays required

publicly_observable_constraints: Internet military information rules may apply when military information is published or transmitted online
Military-data protection measures are not fully determined by public civilian-only standards
Defense work may require additional GJB quality and security controls plus secrecy qualifications

missing_controls: Defense-grade identity and operator vetting workflow

required_next_step: Do not claim Chinese military compliance without sponsor-provided standards mapping, local counsel, and accredited assessment path.

sources.title: Internet Military Information Dissemination Management Measures notice
Data Security Law reference noting Central Military Commission handling of military-data protection
